reviews.review_description: I was very excited to use this app because it looked like it would be a lot of fun, but unfortunately, I experienced motion sickness while using it. I was only able to play for a few minutes before I started sweating and feeling very sick. The motion sickness was so severe that I had to lie down and sleep. I looked for a setting in the app that would allow me to adjust the comfort level, but I couldn't find one. I would really appreciate it if the developers could add this option, as I really want to be able to play the app all the way through without feeling sick.

First, thank you developers for this relaxing stress free game, fitness exercise at the same time. 🙏🙏💪😊 .   Everyday I do my 30 minutes paddle in this relaxing exercise.   
I just paddle arounds each the islands 🏝 , enjoy the night time with the moonlight and stars .  How about add more FX effects,  rains or snow if good idea.   Please continue to add more island if possible.   Thank you.

I always go into this game thinking I'll just do a few minutes but end up getting motivated to do more than I anticipated because I see some wildlife or a new island or a new game. Thanks for adding content and making this a decent core and arm workout.

The most immersive game to date with the realistic physics and zen like atmosphere. It truly feels like you are there. The developers adopt a friendly and helpful approach. Despite SUP Island being in early development, I find myself coming back repeatedly due to the different activities and all -round use of the game. A perfect place to de stress, have fun or use for fitness purposes!

I love this app. I'll dive in for 20 minutes or so on a difficult work day and just feel the stress leave me. It is a meditative zen space. Well done, developers -- I can tell that you're just getting started with this so I'll just say: keep it up. You're on to something cool here, and much like the game itself, I'm just gonna sit back and enjoy the ride.
The Menu and start up is bland and mechanics are pretty straight forward, improvements could come with the multiplayer connectivity as well . But it's cool.

i really enjoy the sensation of paddling. the mechanic of collecting coins is great. wish there were more to collect as i've made my way around the island in search for the coins. when the coins run out i lose steam. it would be great if we could paddle to far off locations out into the sea if we could see there were coins to collect there. achievements/coins are a great incentive to paddle long distances. 
the paddling can sometimes be a challenge to keep the flat edge correctly angled for maximum speed. maybe an option to auto align?
the music can get a bit repetitive so maybe the option to turn it down and only have water and environmental sounds would be great.
glad to hear you guys plan to add  more in updates.
thanks for making this an enjoyable experience. 
would you consider adding a web base player for user to play off of a music service like youtube etc?  games that have added that are always keeping me playing longer as i can get lost in music and videos.
keep it up!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback: it's been added to our development roadmap, so look out for future updates as we roll these features into the game. Paddle on!

reviews.review_description:
Overall, I'm really enjoying this experience. It's smooth, has a pretty cool system to earn coins that let you purchase new items, and the overall mechanics and visuals are very solid. Especially the water. It looks very good, especially when you're closer to shore. The devs did a nice job there. 

I'm really hoping they add more to it though. wildlife, maybe eventually a snorkeling option so you can explore further underwater, dynamic weather, customizable day cycles, and the ability to walk around to explore the island as well.

Again, for what it is, it's very relaxing and I'd recommend checking it out for sure.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and please keep this great feedback coming. The v0.2 update has more wildlife (fish and whales). 

We are designing all gameplay to be board-based to maximise immersion, but there will be rivers and inlets to allow you to explore bigger islands.

reviews.review_description: Have done the tutorial several times still not able to change the settings under options. Hard to navigate and frustrating I just give up.

I enjoy SUP in real life, and really appreciate the convenience that this game brings me. Sometimes the weather outside isn't appropriate to SUP, or maybe I just need a few minutes of paddling to relax. The physics are pretty accurate and the mini-games in the latest update are fun. 

I wish there was a setting to turn off the music though. Sometimes I just want to hear the water splashing. Also, an area where you can have timed runs at certain distances would be nice. Maybe 100m, 200m, 500m, and 1km with the game saving your best times.

**UPDATE 2.0** The motion is much, much too sensitive now, I couldn't tolerate more than a couple of minutes. The board zigs back and forth, and I felt like I had even less control.

Loved the addition of wildlife, though. 

Steady motion without that "smooth" glide seems to be better for motion sickness (like Holofit, which causes none.) Looking forward to the next update!

PREVIOUS:

I really loved the immersion, and it was a much more effective workout than I expected! The coin/game aspect is fun too.

My two issues: 
1. I had to stop because I was motion sick. I have no idea if this is something that can be addressed, but I hope so because I would definitely enjoy this game as it expands.

2. I was hopeless at steering. A tutorial, even an optional one, would be great, especially as I've never tried paddle boarding in real life.

I exercise frequently and intensely, and I definitely felt the effort in the core and was sweating in the 15 minutes I played. I would have gone longer if not for the motion sickness issue.

Overall though, it's really cool to try something entirely new in VR.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and for your great feedback. We've updated the controls in v0.3 so hopefully the steering and comfort is improved - let us know how you go!
Fair enough! We are still in the early-access/beta phase so there's plenty more to come. Hopefully you'll come back and check it out again soon.

reviews.review_description:
The game is definitely fun but I can only paddle into a vast ocean with no landmarks other than the 1 island that you start  next o the occasional wale or school of fish for so long. It is relaxing but there is nothing there that keeps your attention to make you want to keep playing. I have yet to see anyone besides myself in the multiplayer lobbies, so I can't even paddle with other people. I would recommend maybe putting in a few destination routs with checkpoints you have to paddle through consecutively. Just food for thought, otherwise great game. 
     -Cainan

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and glad to hear you had fun. We really like your checkpoint idea and will be adding it as one of the objectives in future updates. We have just published a 'road map' for the game so you can see what we have planned: https://apps.ezone.com/?p=2828 - and anyone that gets the game now gets all future updates and special bonus items at no additional cost.
